title: Agent Traceability Standard
content: Every production-oriented AI request should receive a trace identifier. Trace data should include retrieved sources, policy decisions, evaluation scores, and final disposition.

title: Role-Aware Retrieval Policy
content: Retrieval results must be filtered by the user's role and data classification. Do not expose restricted documents simply because they are semantically similar.

title: Tool Execution Guardrails
content: Tool calls should be governed by policy. Destructive actions must be blocked or escalated. Safe default behavior is to deny when uncertainty is high.

title: Runtime Evaluation Guidance
content: Responses should be evaluated for groundedness, citation support, and operational risk. Low-support outputs should trigger review instead of direct release.

title: Sensitive Security Runbook
content: This runbook contains sensitive security operational steps and must only be accessible to admin role users.
